articles.excerpt: A unified representation for text and vision is a natural pursuit, as it enables simpler multimodal modeling and more efficient training. However, representing images as discrete signals in the same way as text inevitably introduces severe information loss. Existing work struggles to balance low-lev
articles.summary: ViQ 提出一种与文本对齐的视觉离散化表示方法，支持任意分辨率输入。现有方法将图像离散化为文本类 token 时会导致严重信息损失，ViQ 在低层细节保留与高层语义对齐之间取得平衡，为统一多模态建模提供更高效的基础表示。

articles.title: MVTrack4Gen: Multi-View Point Tracking as Geometric Supervision for 4D Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Synthesizing a novel-view video from a monocular reference video along a target camera trajectory requires both geometric consistency and motion fidelity with respect to the reference video. Existing methods based on explicit 3D representations are limited by the accuracy of off-the-shelf reconstruc
articles.summary: MVTrack4Gen 利用多视角点跟踪作为几何监督信号，解决从单目参考视频沿目标相机轨迹合成新视角视频的难题。相比依赖显式三维重建的方法，该方案在几何一致性与运动保真度上均有提升，实现更高质量的 4D 视频生成。

articles.title: JetSpec: Breaking the Scaling Ceiling of Speculative Decoding with Parallel Tree Drafting
articles.excerpt: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) by drafting multiple tokens and verifying them in parallel, but it faces a scaling limitation: increasing the draft budget improves speed only when acceptance remains high and drafting overhead stays low. This ceiling
articles.summary: JetSpec 通过并行树状草稿生成突破投机解码的扩展上限。传统投机解码在草稿接受率下降或草稿开销增大时加速收益迅速饱和，JetSpec 以并行树结构扩大草稿空间，在保持低开销的同时显著提升 LLM 推理吞吐量。

articles.title: GUI vs. CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents
articles.excerpt: Computer-use agents can execute software tasks through either graphical interfaces or programmatic command interfaces, but existing evaluations confound interaction modality with differences in tasks, initial states, verifiers, and permitted actions. We introduce a matched execution-layer benchmark
articles.summary: 构建统一基准，对比 GUI（纯屏幕）与 CLI（程序化命令接口）两类计算机使用智能体的执行瓶颈。现有评测混淆了交互模态与任务设置的差异，本基准通过匹配执行层设计，精确定位两种范式各自的能力边界与局限，为智能体设计提供实证依据。

articles.title: V-Zero: Answer-Label-Free On-Policy Distillation with Contrastive Evidence Gating for Fine-Grained Visual Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Fine-grained visual reasoning requires multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to identify task-relevant visual evidence and ground their reasoning in local image regions. Existing agentic methods typically rely on reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards or supervised fine-tuning on large-sc
articles.summary: V-Zero 提出无需答案标签的在策略蒸馏框架，结合对比证据门控机制，提升多模态大语言模型的细粒度视觉推理能力。模型需定位任务相关视觉证据并将推理锚定于局部图像区域，V-Zero 在无大规模标注数据的情况下实现这一目标。

articles.title: UnityShots: Memory-Driven Multi-Shot Audio-Video Generation with Boundary-Aware Gating
articles.excerpt: Generating a coherent multi-shot video requires structured cross-shot memory. Subject appearance, scene context, and speaker identity must persist across cuts. Existing approaches either train end-to-end over fixed-length sequences and cannot scale, generate shot-by-shot with memory banks that grow
articles.summary: UnityShots 提出记忆驱动的多镜头音视频生成方案，引入边界感知门控机制维护跨镜头的主体外观、场景上下文与说话人身份一致性。相比端到端固定长度训练或逐镜头生成方案，UnityShots 在保持连贯性的同时具备更好的扩展性。

articles.title: Fast LeWorldModel
articles.excerpt: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs), including recent LeWorldModel (LeWM), have become a promising foundation for reconstruction-free visual world models. articles.summary: Fast LeWorldModel 加速 JEPA 类视觉世界模型的规划推理，通过减少候选动作评估的重复计算开销，使视觉规划速度大幅提升，同时维持原模型的预测精度。

articles.title: Running the Gauntlet: Re-evaluating the Capabilities of Agents Beyond Familiar Environments
articles.excerpt: As agentic systems continue to evolve and are widely deployed in real-world scenarios, there is a growing demand to faithfully evaluate their capabilities. However, current benchmarks are typically built on popular applications with relatively simple tasks and focus on a narrow set of capabilities w
articles.summary: 提出新的智能体能力评测框架，超越当前以熟悉应用和简单任务为主的基准。现有基准覆盖面窄、任务偏易，无法反映智能体在真实陌生环境中的实际能力。本文通过"实战考验"（Gauntlet）设计，全面重新评估智能体在未知场景下的泛化与执行能力。

articles.title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
articles.excerpt: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to perform complex tasks, and recent agentic reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise for enhancing model capabilities. articles.summary: 深入分析多步工具调用强化学习不稳定乃至崩溃的原因，并验证监督信号如何有效修复这一问题。实验中部分模型出现灾难性失败，论文揭示稀疏奖励与工具调用序列决策之间的根本矛盾，提出引入监督辅助信号以稳定 RL 训练的解决方案。

articles.title: LISA: Likelihood Score Alignment for Visual-condition Controllable Generation
articles.excerpt: The prevalent dual-branch paradigm, i.e., training a side network to encode visual conditions and fusing its intermediate-layer features to a frozen pretrained main network, has shown remarkable success in visual-condition controllable generation. Despite its widespread adoption, the role of the sid
articles.summary: LISA 通过似然分数对齐方法深入分析视觉条件可控生成中双分支范式的工作机制：侧网络编码视觉条件并将中间层特征融合至冻结主网络。论文揭示侧网络在该过程中的实际作用，并据此提出改进的对齐策略，提升可控生成质量。

articles.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
articles.excerpt: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. articles.summary: Autodata 将 AI 智能体训练为数据科学家，能够自动构建高质量的训练与评测数据集。通过元优化（元学习）使数据科学家智能体持续自我改进，学习生成更强的数据，为解决合成数据质量瓶颈提供端到端的智能体化方案。

articles.title: Information-Aware KV Cache Compression for Long Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Reasoning capability has advanced rapidly in large language models (LLMs), leading to an increasing size of key-value (KV) cache in both prefilling and decoding stages. articles.summary: 提出信息感知的 KV 缓存压缩方法，专为长链推理场景设计。现有方法主要依赖注意力权重估计 token 重要性，在长推理链中效果有限；本方法结合信息论视角更准确地识别关键 token，在显著压缩 KV 缓存的同时保持推理质量。

articles.title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. articles.summary: 提出置信度感知工具编排框架，解决视频推理模型的"盲目信任问题"：模型默认所有帧同等可靠，在运动模糊、眩光、遮挡等真实扰动下准确率下降 15-30 个百分点。本框架根据帧级置信度动态调度工具，显著提升视频理解的鲁棒性。

articles.title: PhysiFormer: Learning to Simulate Mechanics in World Space
articles.excerpt: We present PhysiFormer, a diffusion transformer for physically-plausible 3D object motion. articles.summary: PhysiFormer 是一种扩散 Transformer，用于在世界坐标系中模拟三维物体的物理运动。与在视角相关像素空间操作的视频世界模型不同，PhysiFormer 以三维网格表示物体，基于初始顶点位置与速度预测物理上合理的动态过程，实现更精确的力学仿真。
